title: conyza telekii
intro: Conyza telekii, also known as Hungarian fleabane, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to create herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. Conyza telekii is also valued for its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions.
